zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱
zh.content:
目前AVAX/USD价格维持在$7.71附近，日内波动幅度有限，呈现轻微上行压力，但整体仍偏弱。价格低于20日均线$7.92，显示短期多头动力不足，存在调整压力，市场短期仍可能维持震荡格局。  

MACD指标显示为-0.148，表明空头动能仍占上风，且缺少信号线确认，意味着短期仍需谨慎操作。RSI未提供，但价格持续低于SMA20，结合成交量可观察是否出现超卖迹象，以判断潜在反弹。  

支撑位关注$7.62附近，若失守可能触发进一步下探至$7.50区域；阻力位在$7.92至$8.00区间，多头若突破可尝试短线追涨。整体价格区间较窄，波动性有限，投资者可重点关注关键支撑与阻力触发信号。  

交易策略上，短线可偏向观望或低仓介入，止损设置在$7.60以下，突破阻力可逐步加仓，但需严格控制风险。中期投资者可等待价格站稳SMA20及MACD趋势反转确认，再考虑布局，以降低回撤风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading at 7.7099, remaining under pressure despite a modest 0.61% gain over the last 24 hours. The price continues to trade below the 20-period SMA at 7.9202, suggesting that the broader short-term trend remains bearish. Recent trading has been confined to a relatively narrow range between 7.6197 and 7.7440, indicating limited bullish momentum and a market that is still searching for stronger directional conviction.

The moving average configuration favors sellers, as the current price sits approximately 2.7% below the SMA(20). This indicates that rallies may continue to encounter resistance until buyers can reclaim and hold above the 7.92 area. The MACD value of -0.1480 also reflects lingering negative momentum. While the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD reading alone suggests that bearish pressure remains present, although the pace of decline may be stabilizing given the recent positive daily performance.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the session low at 7.62. A break below this level could expose further downside toward the psychological 7.50 region, where buyers may attempt to re-enter. On the upside, initial resistance appears around 7.74, followed by the more significant SMA-based resistance near 7.92. A successful move above 7.92 would improve the short-term outlook and potentially open the path toward the 8.10–8.20 zone.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautious stance while the price remains below the 20-period moving average. Aggressive buyers could look for bullish confirmation through a breakout above 7.74 and especially 7.92 before increasing exposure. Meanwhile, short-term sellers may view rebounds toward resistance as opportunities, provided price action continues to respect those levels. Risk management remains important, as AVAX is trading near support and could experience increased volatility if either support or resistance is decisively breached.
